title: Quest 35220 3 Tier Electric Food Steamer / 7.2L / 3 Stackable Cooking Baskets & Rice Bowl/Healthy Cooking Of Vegetables, Meats & Fish / 60 Minute Timer Function/Energy Efficient Healty Eating
features: 3 TIER ELECTRIC FOOD STEAMER – This compact 3 tier food steamer with additional rice bowl is the perfect kitchen appliance that will allow you to cook multiple foods at once, all in a super healthy and efficient way.

3 SEPARATE COMPARTMENTS – This electric food steamer features 3 separate compartments that can house an array of separate foods, and up to 7.2 litres in volume. Each of the compartments can be used separately, or all at once for maximum effect, and are dishwasher safe.

60 MINUTE TIMER – The steamer has a built-in timer functionality which allows you to pre-set the cooking time for anywhere up to an hour, giving you peace of mind that your vegetables, meats and fresh fish will all be cooked to your liking by the time you return to the kitchen.

HEALTHY COOKING – Steaming food is one of the healthiest ways to cook, most notably for the fact that it requires no oils or fats, and retains most of the food’s nutrients at the same time. As well as being healthy it also suits the adventurous as you can cook dumplings and chocolate puddings too!

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page Three Compartments The three separate compartments allow you to steam three different foods all at once. Large Capacity Each compartment holds up to 2.4 litres of food, giving it a total capacity of 7.2 litres. Rice Bowl Included Enjoy rice alongside your meal, as a rice bowl designed to fit on top of the unit is included. Healthy Cooking This steam cooking style is ideal for health-conscious people, as no oils or fats are needed. Easy Setup Cook food perfectly with minimal effort, as you only need to adjust the 60 minute timer.
